div1.entryFree:
Garnish, vb. 1) to deck, to adorn: --ed with such bedecking ornaments of praise, LLL II, 78. with taper-light to seek the beauteous eye of heaven to g. John IV, 2, 15. --ed and decked in modest complement, H5 II, 2, 134.
2) to equip, to supply, to fit out: a many fools, that stand in better place, --ed like him, Merch. III, 5, 74.
